wastewise.title: WasteWise AI
wastewise.subtitle: AI demand forecasting and waste-control dashboard

analysis.title: Demand driver
analysis.body: Rain and afternoon exams reduce expected campus lunch traffic by 7-9%.

analysis.title: Uncertainty
analysis.body: Vegetarian set has the widest P10-P90 range because recent sales are volatile.

analysis.title: Baseline comparison
analysis.body: The AI forecast is lower than the 7-day average for chicken rice but stable for noodles.

recommendations: Reduce chicken rice first batch by 18 portions.
Keep noodle prep stable and trigger second batch if 70% sells before 12:30.
Prepare vegetarian set in smaller first batch and monitor by 12:15.

report.headline: Recommended plan cuts avoidable leftovers while keeping stockout risk controlled.
report.nextStep: Record actual sales, leftovers, stockouts, and overrides after lunch.

clinicflow.title: ClinicFlow AI
clinicflow.subtitle: AI scheduling and patient-flow optimization dashboard

analysis.title: No-show risk
analysis.body: Three follow-up appointments have high risk due to no reminder response and prior late cancellation.

analysis.title: Queue pressure
analysis.body: Two long-consultation cases are scheduled before the 15:00 peak, creating waiting-time risk.

analysis.title: Service boundary
analysis.body: The system recommends operations actions only; it does not make clinical decisions.

recommendations: Send reminder messages to the five highest no-show risk patients.
Move one routine follow-up earlier to reduce the 15:00 queue spike.
Insert a 10-minute buffer before the long consultation block.

report.headline: Adjusted schedule improves utilization while reducing predicted peak waiting time.
report.nextStep: Record actual arrivals, wait time, no-shows, and staff overrides after the session.

hireready.title: HireReady AI
hireready.subtitle: Localized AI career readiness dashboard

analysis.title: Matched evidence
analysis.body: The resume has project evidence for Excel analysis, survey work, and bilingual presentation.

analysis.title: Missing keywords
analysis.body: The target role mentions SQL, dashboarding, and stakeholder communication more strongly than the resume.

analysis.title: Rewrite guardrail
analysis.body: The AI coach rewrites from existing evidence and flags unsupported claims instead of inventing achievements.

recommendations: Rewrite the consulting project bullet with quantified survey analysis evidence.
Add a one-week SQL mini-project to close the strongest skill gap.
Practise a STAR answer about resolving an ambiguous stakeholder requirement.

report.headline: The candidate is ready to apply after targeted resume and interview improvements.
report.nextStep: Complete SQL mini-project and repeat mock interview before submitting.
